human_blockers: Stripe: Create streakr-annual (.99/yr) + streakr-monthly (.99/mo) payment links
Apple: Fill appleId + ascAppId + teamId in streakr-native/eas.json
Human: npx expo prebuild && npx expo run:ios in streakr-native/

decisions.streakr_native: ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW — assets done, EAS done, ASO done. Ready for TestFlight pending Stripe + Apple creds.
decisions.runningstreak_native: BUILD_NEW_NEXT_CYCLE — spec written, fork from streakr template. 4.19M market, zero paid native competitors.
decisions.fitness_cluster: PARK — build after Streakr TestFlight. Use Streakr as template.

next_cycle_p0: Build RunningStreak native from streakr fork per spec
